pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 11 if the source/target version remains set to 1.8, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace the removed javax.inject module from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without this dependency, classes using @Inject will fail to compile or run with ClassNotFoundException.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation module from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without this dependency, classes using annotations like @PostConstruct or @Resource will fail to compile or run with ClassNotFoundException.
